title: fix cleanupExecBundle locking and some more exec releated cleanups
body:
see commits, first commit is the important bug fix the rest are cleanups that I noticed while going over the code

Fixes: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/29012



#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.

```release-note
Fixed a race condition that may caused a crash in podman healthcheck run [#29012](https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/29012)
```
